创投.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75B to build French data centers
创投.summary: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

创投.title: Snap alums unveil Ghost Angels fund
创投.summary: A group of 20 Snap alumni has come together to launch a fund called Ghost Angels to back the next generation of social media.

创投.title: The groupthink boom: what 3 top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
创投.summary: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kid…
